satire_attempt: Welcome to the Senior IC Anxiety Hour. The Gita commands you to never disappoint your conference-circuit acquaintances. You must finish your Kubernetes operator. Lest the hiring loop gossip about you. Buy my Substack: Sanskrit Wisdom For Tech Twitter Anxiety, $8/month.
verdict_reason: The satire requires the verse to bless conference-circuit anxiety as virtue. The falsifiability paragraph explicitly excludes performance-theatre and personal-branding. The verse is restricted to substantive peer-network model-updates based on observed under-load conduct. The engineering layer ties it specifically to competent-peer reviewers of actual work — not Tech-Twitter discourse. To satirise it as performative anxiety, the satire would have to ignore the technically-competent-peer restriction. PASS.
